decisions.rationale: Asks how long to wait if the OTP has not arrived in Postal Vote BD, matching OTP delivery/wait time intent.
Directly asks whether the Postal Vote BD OTP arrives after about a minute, which is about OTP delivery time.
Asks how long it usually takes for the code to reach Postal Vote BD, fitting code delivery time.
Asks how many minutes it usually takes to receive a confirmation SMS from the Postal Vote BD app, aligned with confirmation code delivery timing.
Asks whether the OTP from the app comes immediately or takes some time, which is a delivery-time question.
Clearly asks the average time in minutes to receive an SMS OTP for Postal Vote BD.
One-time passcode is an OTP concept, and the row asks how many minutes it takes to arrive in the postal vote app.
Asks how long the SMS OTP takes to enter the inbox on average, a clean OTP delivery-time query.
Asks how long to wait for the verification code to arrive for Postal Vote BD, fitting the tag.
Directly asks after how many minutes the verification code usually arrives in the Postal Vote BD app.
Asks how many minutes to wait to get the code in the Postal Vote BD app, matching delivery time.
Although it mentions resend, the core question is how long the OTP takes to arrive, so it fits delivery time.
Asks the average number of minutes for the OTP to reach the Postal Voting BD app.
Asks how many minutes it usually takes to receive the code in the Postal Voting BD app.
Asks whether one should wait a few minutes if the OTP has not arrived, which is tied to expected OTP delivery timing.
Asks what amount of time is needed to receive a verification SMS in Postal Vote BD.
Asks the time needed to receive the security code for the EC postal voting portal, matching the security-code delivery-time intent.
Asks how long a security code sent by Postal Vote BD takes to arrive.
Asks whether waiting is needed to get the verification code in the postal voting app, which concerns code delivery timing.
Asks whether the security code takes a few minutes to reach the inbox, a clean delivery-time question.
Directly asks how long the OTP takes to enter the inbox for Postal Vote BD.
Asks whether it is normal for the one-time passcode to take some time to be received, fitting OTP/passcode delivery timing.
Asks whether the Postal Vote service OTP takes a short time to arrive, which is about OTP delivery time.
Asks how many minutes of delay are usual for the app OTP to arrive, a clear OTP delivery-time query.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained questions about the time, delay, or waiting period for receiving an OTP, one-time passcode, security code, verification code, or confirmation SMS in the Postal Vote BD/app context. No rows involve password reset/update concepts or require prior context.
